concept: Visualize commanding a nomadic caravan crossing a vast desert where landmarks physically shift positions each night. Map the desert's changing geography by tracking celestial patterns and collecting navigational folklore from scattered oasis settlements. Manage your caravan's resources and morale while protecting it from desert predators and rival traders competing for limited routes. Uncover the metaphysical nature of the desert itself as a conscious entity testing those who seek to traverse its ever-changing expanse.
